Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters layout polish:
- Restyles the Crafters workflow to better match the GreenZone main window.
- Adds a compact workflow status bar with stocked and transferred material progress.
- Keeps transferred material status scoped to the active withdrawal plan.
